# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'PROJECT_TYPE',
            choices: ['nodejs', 'python', 'java', 'go', 'custom'],
            description: 'Select the project type for default configurations'
        )
        string(
            name: 'WORKSPACE_DIR',
            defaultValue: '.',
            description: 'Working directory relative to the repository root'
        )
        text(
            name: 'SETUP_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running setup..."
# Add your setup commands here
# e.g., install dependencies, configure environment''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run during the setup/preparation phase'
        )
        text(
            name: 'BUILD_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running build..."
# Add your build commands here
# e.g., npm run build, mvn package, go build''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run during the build phase'
        )
        text(
            name: 'TEST_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running tests..."
# Add your test commands here
# e.g., npm test, pytest, mvn test, go test ./...''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run during the test phase'
        )
        text(
            name: 'LINT_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running linting..."
# Add your lint/static analysis commands here
# e.g., eslint ., flake8, checkstyle''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run during the lint/static analysis phase'
        )
        text(
            name: 'SECURITY_SCAN_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running security scan..."
# Add your security scanning commands here
# e.g., npm audit, safety check, trivy''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run during the security scanning phase'
        )
        text(
            name: 'PACKAGE_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running packaging..."
# Add your packaging/artifact creation commands here
# e.g., docker build, tar, zip''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run during the packaging phase'
        )
        text(
            name: 'DEPLOY_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running deployment..."
# Add your deployment commands here
# e.g., kubectl apply, aws deploy, scp''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run during the deployment phase'
        )
        text(
            name: 'POST_DEPLOY_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running post-deployment verification..."
# Add your post-deployment verification commands here
# e.g., health checks, smoke tests''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run after deployment for verification'
        )
        text(
            name: 'CLEANUP_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running cleanup..."
# Add your cleanup commands here''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run during cleanup (always runs)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES',
            defaultValue: '''# KEY=VALUE format, one per line
# APP_ENV=production
# DEBUG=false''',
            description: 'Custom environment variables (KEY=VALUE format, one per line)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'GIT_REPO_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Git repository URL to clone (leave empty to use pipeline SCM)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'GIT_BRANCH',
            defaultValue: 'main',
            description: 'Git branch to checkout'
        )
        string(
            name: 'GIT_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Jenkins credentials ID for Git authentication (if needed)'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_TESTS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the test phase'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_LINT',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the lint/static analysis phase'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_SECURITY_SCAN',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the security scanning phase'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_DEPLOY',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the deployment phase'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DRY_RUN',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Dry run mode - print commands without executing them'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TIMEOUT_MINUTES',
            defaultValue: '60',
            description: 'Overall pipeline timeout in minutes'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACTS_PATTERN',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Glob pattern for archiving artifacts (e.g., **/target/*.jar, dist/**/*)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TEST_RESULTS_PATTERN',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Glob pattern for test results (e.g., **/test-results/*.xml, **/surefire-reports/*.xml)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'NOTIFICATION_EMAIL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Email address for build notifications (leave empty to skip)'
        )
    }

    options {
        timeout(time: "${params.TIMEOUT_MINUTES}".toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES')
        timestamps()
        ansiColor('xterm')
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
    }

    environment {
        PIPELINE_PROJECT_TYPE = "${params.PROJECT_TYPE}"
        PIPELINE_DRY_RUN = "${params.DRY_RUN}"
    }

    stages {
        stage('Initialize') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "============================================="
                    echo "  Pipeline Configuration Summary"
                    echo "============================================="
                    echo "Project Type:      ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}"
                    echo "Working Directory: ${params.WORKSPACE_DIR}"
                    echo "Git Repo:          ${params.GIT_REPO_URL ?: 'Using pipeline SCM'}"
                    echo "Git Branch:        ${params.GIT_BRANCH}"
                    echo "Skip Tests:        ${params.SKIP_TESTS}"
                    echo "Skip Lint:         ${params.SKIP_LINT}"
                    echo "Skip Security:     ${params.SKIP_SECURITY_SCAN}"
                    echo "Skip Deploy:       ${params.SKIP_DEPLOY}"
                    echo "Dry Run:           ${params.DRY_RUN}"
                    echo "Timeout:           ${params.TIMEOUT_MINUTES} minutes"
                    echo "============================================="

                    // Parse and set custom environment variables
                    if (params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES?.trim()) {
                        def envLines = params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES.trim().split('\n')
                        envLines.each { line ->
                            line = line.trim()
                            if (line && !line.startsWith('#') && line.contains('=')) {
                                def parts = line.split('=', 2)
                                def key = parts[0].trim()
                                def value = parts[1].trim()
                                env."${key}" = value
                                echo "Set environment variable: ${key}=${value}"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Checkout') {
            when {
                expression { return params.GIT_REPO_URL?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Checking out from: ${params.GIT_REPO_URL} (branch: ${params.GIT_BRANCH})"
                    if (params.GIT_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) {
                        git(
                            url: params.GIT_REPO_URL,
                            branch: params.GIT_BRANCH,
                            credentialsId: params.GIT_CREDENTIALS_ID
                        )
                    } else {
                        git(
                            url: params.GIT_REPO_URL,
                            branch: params.GIT_BRANCH
                        )
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Setup') {
            steps {
                script {
                    executePhase('Setup', params.SETUP_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    executePhase('Build', params.BUILD_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Lint') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_LINT }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executePhase('Lint', params.LINT_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_TESTS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executePhase('Test', params.TEST_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
            post {
                always {
                    script {
                        if (params.TEST_RESULTS_PATTERN?.trim()) {
                            try {
                                junit testResults: params.TEST_RESULTS_PATTERN, allowEmptyResults: true
                                echo "Test results collected from: ${params.TEST_RESULTS_PATTERN}"
                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                echo "Warning: Could not collect test results - ${e.message}"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Security Scan') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_SECURITY_SCAN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executePhase('Security Scan', params.SECURITY_SCAN_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Package') {
            steps {
                script {
                    executePhase('Package', params.PACKAGE_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_DEPLOY }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executePhase('Deploy', params.DEPLOY_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Post-Deploy Verification') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_DEPLOY }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executePhase('Post-Deploy Verification', params.POST_DEPLOY_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            script {
                // Run cleanup commands
                executePhase('Cleanup', params.CLEANUP_COMMANDS)

                // Archive artifacts if pattern is specified
                if (params.ARTIFACTS_PATTERN?.trim()) {
                    try {
                        archiveArtifacts artifacts: params.ARTIFACTS_PATTERN, allowEmptyArchive: true
                        echo "Artifacts archived with pattern: ${params.ARTIFACTS_PATTERN}"
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        echo "Warning: Could not archive artifacts - ${e.message}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        success {
            script {
                echo "============================================="
                echo "  Pipeline completed SUCCESSFULLY"
                echo "============================================="
                sendNotification('SUCCESS')
            }
        }
        failure {
            script {
                echo "============================================="
                echo "  Pipeline FAILED"
                echo "============================================="
                sendNotification('FAILURE')
            }
        }
        unstable {
            script {
                echo "============================================="
                echo "  Pipeline completed with UNSTABLE status"
                echo "============================================="
                sendNotification('UNSTABLE')
            }
        }
        aborted {
            script {
                echo "============================================="
                echo "  Pipeline was ABORTED"
                echo "============================================="
                sendNotification('ABORTED')
            }
        }
    }
}

def executePhase(String phaseName, String commands) {
    if (!commands?.trim()) {
        echo "No commands specified for phase: ${phaseName}. Skipping."
        return
    }

    echo "============================================="
    echo "  Executing Phase: ${phaseName}"
    echo "============================================="

    def workDir = params.WORKSPACE_DIR ?: '.'

    if (params.DRY_RUN) {
        echo "[DRY RUN] Would execute the following commands in directory '${workDir}':"
        echo "---"
        echo commands.trim()
        echo "---"
        return
    }

    def sanitizedCommands = sanitizeCommands(commands)

    dir(workDir) {
        def shellScript = """#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "Phase: ${phaseName}"
echo "Working Directory: \$(pwd)"
echo "Timestamp: \$(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"
echo "---"

${sanitizedCommands}

echo "---"
echo "Phase '${phaseName}' completed successfully."
"""
        sh shellScript
    }
}

def sanitizeCommands(String commands) {
    if (!commands?.trim()) {
        return ''
    }

    def sanitized = commands.trim()

    // Filter out comment-only lines for cleaner output but keep them for readability
    // The actual filtering of dangerous patterns happens here
    def dangerousPatterns = [
        ~/(?i)rm\s+-rf\s+\/\s*$/,           // rm -rf / (root filesystem deletion)
        ~/(?i)mkfs\./,                         // filesystem format commands
        ~/(?i)dd\s+if=.*of=\/dev\/[sh]d/,     // raw disk writes
        ~/(?i):\(\)\{.*\|.*&\s*\};\s*:/       // fork bombs
    ]

    def lines = sanitized.split('\n')
    def filteredLines = []

    lines.each { line ->
        def trimmedLine = line.trim()
        def isDangerous = false

        dangerousPatterns.each { pattern ->
            if (trimmedLine =~ pattern) {
                isDangerous = true
                echo "WARNING: Blocked potentially dangerous command: ${trimmedLine}"
            }
        }

        if (!isDangerous) {
            filteredLines.add(line)
        }
    }

    return filteredLines.join('\n')
}

def sendNotification(String buildStatus) {
    if (!params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL?.trim()) {
        return
    }

    try {
        def subject = "[Jenkins] ${env.JOB_NAME} #${env.BUILD_NUMBER} - ${buildStatus}"
        def body = """
Pipeline: ${env.JOB_NAME}
Build Number: ${env.BUILD_NUMBER}
Status: ${buildStatus}
Project Type: ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}
Duration: ${currentBuild.durationString?.replace(' and counting', '') ?: 'N/A'}
Build URL: ${env.BUILD_URL}

Parameters Used:
- Project Type: ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}
- Working Directory: ${params.WORKSPACE_DIR}
- Git Repo: ${params.GIT_REPO_URL ?: 'Pipeline SCM'}
- Git Branch: ${params.GIT_BRANCH}
- Skip Tests: ${params.SKIP_TESTS}
- Skip Lint: ${params.SKIP_LINT}
- Skip Security Scan: ${params.SKIP_SECURITY_SCAN}
- Skip Deploy: ${params.SKIP_DEPLOY}
- Dry Run: ${params.DRY_RUN}
"""

        emailext(
            subject: subject,
            body: body,
            to: params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL,
            mimeType: 'text/plain'
        )
        echo "Notification sent to: ${params.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL}"
    } catch (Exception e) {
        echo "Warning: Could not send email notification - ${e.message}"
    }
}
